title: 12 Months Admin Assistant - Education Sector ($2000 to $2300)  #NJN
description:
1 Year Contract

Mon-Fri, 9am to 6pm

Dhoby Ghaut

Key Responsibilities

Application Processing

  • Enter applicant data accurately into the admissions systems.
  • Screen application forms and supporting documents for completeness and accuracy.
  • Check and verify application fees paid by applicants.
  • Verify applicant documents against official identification to ensure compliance.
  • Liaise with course consultants for missing or additional information when required.

Offer Management

  • Prepare and issue offer letters for successful applicants in line with institutional policies.
  • Support the issuance of conditional or unconditional offers and required documents based on the programme admission requirements.

Compliance & Quality Assurance

  • Ensure all admissions records comply with regulatory requirements.
  • Promptly flag discrepancies or fraudulent documents to supervisors.
  • Maintain strict confidentiality of applicant data in compliance with the Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA).

Administrative Support

  • Collaborate with colleagues in the Admissions and Recruitment team to ensure a smooth and efficient admissions process for students.

Requirements

  • Diploma or equivalent qualification; prior experience in education administration or admissions will be an advantage.
  • Proficient in MS Office applications and student information systems (training will be provided if needed).

Jessica Nguyen Huynh Thanh Truc

CEI Reg. No. R23113787

EA License No. 99C4599

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

postedCompany.description:
Established since 1996, Recruit Express has emerged as the leading staffing solutions provider that has set a proven track record for matching the right people to the right organization within the shortest time. With our vast network of resources, extensive databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only want the best in their teams.


In our relentless pursuit of excellent service, we have adopted best practices and dynamic growth strategies in expanding our operations across the Asia Pacific regions: We have offices in Singapore, Sydney, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo and Bangkok.

With 400 permanent committed consultants from various professional backgrounds and disciplines, we make a difference by delivering top-notch services to our clients and candidates alike.
